name: Lower East Side Lox
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Lox or Smoked Salmon; Cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese to a smooth consistency.
2. Blend in the sour cream.
3. Mix in the lox thoroughly.
4. Stir in all of the other ingredients.
5. Cover and chill.
Makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested dippers: Bagel Chips, Tomatoes, Radishes, Cucumber, Scallions, and Figs.
